title: Automate Export View to PDF + automatically send it as an email
excerpt:

posts.author: JasperDemeurie (Jasper)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all

I’m using Monday for a lot of boards, and every month I need to update a lot of stakeholders on different montly data.

I averagely export 16-20 views → PDF → download → put on mail myself.

Is there any way to automatically export & mail a pdf view of an entire tab?
Tabs contains multiple widgets, mostly graphs.

posts.author: graceatkins1010 (grace)
posts.cookedHtml:
you can try our app, it has board export and send on email directly feature - https://monday.com/marketplace/listing/10000567/docgenerator---pdf-export-automations.
let us know if any feature missing we will be able to add quickly

posts.author: Karmon (Karen)
posts.cookedHtml: It sounds like you’re looking for a way to streamline your workflow with Monday. One option you can consider is automating the export process through integrations or using a third-party tool like DocGenerator, which can export boards to PDFs and automatically send them via email. Another approach could be using Monday’s native automation features, if they fit your use case, to set up a process where it sends reports periodically.

posts.author: willsamadi (Will Samadi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Jasper,

I hate promoting without a solution so if my app ActionLink solves your problem shoot me a DM and I’ll give you 1 year of free access.

With actionlink you can share boards, items or subitems in many different ways with a client as a portal. So the client gets a link, clicks on it and can see a live report of how everything is going. Feel free to DM me if you want a demo.

I would love to sit down with you and your team to develop features on top of what already exists to nail down your requirements.

posts.author: TKingSH (Tami King)
posts.cookedHtml: ++1 vote for this without needing a 3rd party app/integration

posts.author: JasperDemeurie (Jasper)
posts.cookedHtml:
Monday actually implemented this, but with a very low maximum of PDF exports.
For our version it’s 5 scheduled PDF exports. Which is way too little for me & upgrading specifically for this is kinda stupid.

A halfbaked solution, sadly.
